name: Cucumber Ring with Chicken Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Fresh tarragon, chopped or 1/2 tsp dried
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly mix cucumber, onion, lemon juice, parsley, and tarragon.
2. Pour sherry into a medium-size bowl, sprinkle gelatin on top, and let soften for a few minutes.
3. Bring chicken stock to boil, pour over gelatin, and stir until dissolved.
4. Turn the gelatin mixture into the cucumber mixture and mix thoroughly.
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Pour the mixture into a 5-cup ring mold and chill until set.
7. Prepare the filling by combining shredded chicken, chopped celery, finely chopped scallion, additional lemon juice, and mayonnaise, then mixing well.
8. Turn the cucumber mold out onto a dish and fill the center with chicken salad.
9. Serve with rounds of toast or hot crunchy bread.
Serves 6 - 8
This refreshing dish even tastes as if it is good for you. A most appropriate starter (or even a light lunch dish) for Pisces, the most fluid of all the water signs, who will naturally respond to the rhythmic curves suggested by this shimmering form.
